dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, you found her? You actually found her? But... what do you mean she won't come back?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: She's alive, but she's built a life out there: a small homestead {location_hint}. {quest_focus} didn't come home because she was ashamed of failing the original mission. She needs {quest_item} to winterize before the cold, and the {enemy_type} push closer every week. If we help secure her home, maybe she'll agree to at least visit {location}. {quest_stakes}, but in a way I didn't expect.
dialogueChunks.outro: She's alive and safe, but chose to stay away. I don't know whether to be relieved or heartbroken.

playerResponses.text: One step at a time. Let's keep her safe first.
She left you worrying for three seasons by choice? That's rough.
She's alive and doesn't want to come back. That's your answer.

dialogueChunks.intro: The trail went cold, {player_name}. But then something unexpected happened.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A trader arrived carrying {quest_item} with {target_npc}'s maker's mark. Fresh work, recently crafted. {quest_focus} is confirmed alive and working somewhere, but the trader bought from a middleman {location_hint} deep in {enemy_type} territory. If we trace the supply chain, we find {target_npc}. {quest_threat} makes the journey dangerous.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every lead brings us closer. {quest_stakes}: they're out there.

playerResponses.text: A maker's mark doesn't lie. I'll trace the supply chain.
We're playing detective in enemy territory. Could be worse.
Chasing middlemen through hostile land isn't my idea of progress.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the letter was real. But the situation is more complicated than we thought.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} isn't just being held: they've been working for the group willingly in exchange for protection from the {enemy_type}. They want to leave but fear {quest_threat} will retaliate against {location}. The drop point {location_hint} is watched. We need enough {quest_item} to satisfy the group's demands, and a safe escape route. {quest_stakes}, but freedom is within reach.
dialogueChunks.outro: They're so close. {quest_action} is the last step to bringing them home.

playerResponses.text: Negotiation backed by strength. I'll handle both.
A willing captive who wants out. That's a delicate situation.
If they chose to stay willingly, maybe they should stay.
